_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_35_note: Session 35 (2026-05-29): NVDA deep session (pre-Computex; June 1 keynote still 3 days out) + TSM supplementary. Key findings: (1) Hyperscaler CapEx composition: 60%+ of $700-750B 2026 AI CapEx goes to power/electricity, not chips — NVIDIA GPU demand bounded by energy infrastructure (multi-year), making demand cycle more durable; (2) TSMC CoWoS yield hitting 98% with capacity target refined to 127K WPM by year-end — 4x expansion delivers near-4x usable output at mature yield; (3) US autonomous vessel 'Lightfish' completed first-ever autonomous Taiwan Strait transit (May 28) — enhanced US maritime surveillance capability; (4) Price corrections: NVDA $214.28 (was $212.66), MRVL $201 regular close (was $206.04 AH peak), TSM $425.00 (was $424.34), ANET $154.06; TSM MoS now -9.6% (0.4% above -10% SELL threshold); (5) CLAUDE.md self-improvement: Phase 1a price verification rule added (>1% discrepancy requires verification regular-session close vs. AH/intraday). June 1 NVDA keynote remains ABSOLUTE PRIORITY for Session 36.

event_queue.event: Computex June 1 GTC Taipei keynote 11am Taipei (10pm Manila) — STILL PENDING. Sessions 34+35 pre-keynote updates complete. Session 36 ABSOLUTE PRIORITY: capture full keynote — N1X ARM chip official specs + OEM pricing, Vera Rubin NVL72 official production volume guidance, Dynamo 1.0 GA, Jensen surprise product reveal, any supply chain update.

Computex June 2 joint keynote: Matt Murphy + Jensen Huang (10:30am Taipei, Nangang Exhibition Center) — 'The Future of AI Depends on Connectivity.' NVLink Fusion showcase. Session 36/37: capture keynote outcome, update MRVL entity. Watch for Google TPU/Amazon MPU volume numbers. MRVL corrected to $201 regular close (AH peak was $221).

Computex June 3 press conference + Scorpio X 320-lane live demo (10-11am Taipei, TaiNEX 1 Room 303). Price confirmed at $349.08 close. Session 36/37: capture demo outcome and any hyperscaler design win announcements.
Q3 FY2026 earnings confirmed June 24, 2026 (2:30pm MT). DCF re-run queued for post-earnings session. Prior DCF: IV $442.63, MoS -52.3%, SELL/AVOID (May 26). No deep session before June 24.

_event_queue_note: Session 35: NVDA pre-keynote update #2 complete (CoWoS yield + CapEx power insight); June 1 keynote still pending.
